parameters.query:
SELECT webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $json.body.client_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Refresh Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Refresh Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Refresh Request').item.json.body.token, secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.id, s.token, s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Receive Refresh Request').item.json.body.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT encode(
  hmac(
    concat(
      '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.user_id }}',
      '.',
      '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.role }}',
      '.',
      extract(epoch from now())::bigint::text
    ),
    (SELECT jwt_secret FROM caiac.clients WHERE id = '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.client_id }}'),
    'sha256'
  ),
  'hex'
) as token

UPDATE caiac.sessions
SET token = '{{ $('Generate New Token').item.json.token }}',
    expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '8 hours'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.session_id }}'
RETURNING token, expires_at;

INSERT INTO caiac.audit_log (client_id, user_id, action, detail)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.client_id }}',
    '{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.user_id }}',
    'refresh',
    '{"role": "{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.role }}", "email": "{{ $('Check Token Valid').item.json.email }}"}'
)
RETURNING id, created_at;
